---
title: "Legacy Documentation"
description: "Boundary between the current OPALX manual and the separate historical OPAL manual."
audience: user
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

OPAL and OPALX are documented separately.

- This book covers the current OPALX executable, its physics, and its
  development workflow.
- The [archived OPAL manual]({{< meta legacy-opal-manual-url >}}) preserves the
  historical OPAL documentation as it stood before the manuals were mixed.
- OPAL-CYCL, OPAL-MAP, historical OPAL reports, and historical OPAL examples
  remain with OPAL and are not migrated into either OPALX repository.

If an OPAL concept is implemented in OPALX, it should be documented here only
after the behavior has been verified against current source and tests.
